name: Sharon & Crescent United
description_short: Sharon & Crescent United Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative serving Massachusetts and Rhode Island with competitive rates on auto loans, home equity, debt consolidation, and savings products.
description_long:
Sharon & Crescent United Credit Union (SCU) is a not-for-profit credit union headquartered in Massachusetts with Routing #211385556. The credit union has been serving members since at least 1969, indicating decades of operational history. SCU is federally regulated and insured through NCUA, operating as a traditional member-owned cooperative rather than a for-profit bank.

SCU offers a comprehensive range of consumer and business banking services including auto loans (rates as low as 4.99% APR), home equity loans (5.99% APR), debt consolidation with competitive rates, home renovation financing, Mass Save Heat Loans (0% APR), share savings accounts, and business banking solutions. Members can access online banking, mobile banking, payment services, and a Credit Score Simulator tool. The credit union also provides access to exclusive member benefits like discounted TurboTax (20% off) and H&R Block tax preparation services (up to $25 off).

SCU distinguishes itself through community partnerships, notably collaborating with Boys & Girls Clubs of Metro South to empower youth in Southeastern Massachusetts. The credit union serves a defined geographic region across eight Massachusetts counties (Barnstable, Bristol, Dukes, Middlesex, Nantucket, Norfolk, Plymouth, Suffolk) plus specific towns and Rhode Island counties, maintaining a community-focused membership model. Member testimonials consistently highlight friendly, knowledgeable staff and personalized service across multiple branch locations.

As a credit union, SCU members benefit from not-for-profit structure meaning profits are returned to members rather than shareholders. However, membership is geographically restricted, and the website provides limited detailed information about specific loan terms, fees, minimum deposit requirements, or comprehensive product comparisons relative to competing institutions. Service availability and product offerings appear tailored to regional retail banking needs rather than specialized lending.
services: Auto loans with rates as low as 4.99% APR
Home equity loans (5.99% APR minimum advertised)
Debt consolidation loans with competitive rates
Mass Save Heat Loans (0% APR for energy efficiency)
Payment processing and bill pay services
Credit Score Simulator tool for members
Tax preparation discounts (TurboTax 20% off, H&R Block up to $25 off)
Love My Credit Union Rewards program enrollment
pros: Auto loan rates as low as 4.99% APR with streamlined online application process
Home equity loans starting at 5.99% APR for renovations and home improvements
0% APR Mass Save Heat Loans for energy-efficient home upgrades
Free Credit Score Simulator tool available to online/mobile banking members
Exclusive member discounts: 20% off TurboTax and up to $25 off H&R Block tax prep
Debt consolidation services with competitive rates and accessible online tools
Long operational history (member since 1969 documented) with consistent positive member reviews
Community partnership with Boys & Girls Clubs supporting youth development
cons: Membership restricted to specific geographic areas (8 Massachusetts counties + select towns and Rhode Island counties)
Limited transparency on website regarding specific loan terms, fees, APR ranges, and minimum deposit amounts
No information provided about business loan programs, SBA lending, or commercial credit line details
Website lacks details on savings account types, interest rates, CD offerings, or account minimums
No comparison tools or rate calculators visible beyond the Credit Score Simulator for existing members
best_for: Massachusetts and Rhode Island residents seeking competitive auto refinancing and home equity loans
Homeowners interested in energy-efficient upgrades through Mass Save programs
Small business owners in the service area needing personal and business banking in one institution
Long-term savers and debt consolidation candidates who value credit union member-ownership benefits
diagnosis: SCU Credit Union is best suited for Massachusetts and Rhode Island residents within the membership service area seeking competitive rates on auto loans, home equity products, and debt consolidation with a community-focused institution. The main caveat is strict geographic membership eligibility requirements and limited online transparency regarding specific rates, fees, and product terms—prospective members must contact branches or apply directly to obtain detailed pricing.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Sharon & Crescent United — NCUA-insured credit union in SHARON, MA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
